name: Ford Otomotiv Sanayi A.S.
summary: Ford Otomotiv Sanayi A.S. manufactures, assembles, imports, exports, and sells motor vehicles and spare parts in Turkey. It offers commercial, transit and transit custom, and transit courier vehicles; and cargo trucks, as well as engines and powertrain products for trucks and transit vehicles. The company also imports and sells passenger cars. Ford Otomotiv Sanayi A.S. has a collaboration with Velodyne Lidar, Inc. for the product development and testing of autonomous heavy commercial trucks. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
